title: Road Signs Reasoning Drill
summary: Explain how different types of road signs guide driver behavior.
studentInstructions: Create a text or Markdown file named road-signs-response.txt or road-signs-response.md.
Explain the difference between regulatory, warning, and guide signs.
Give one example of each sign type and describe what action the driver should take.
Write at least one paragraph explaining why identifying the required driver action is more important than only memorizing the sign appearance.

rubric.description: Clearly distinguishes regulatory, warning, and guide signs.
Provides relevant examples and explains the required driver action for each.
Explains why action-based understanding matters for safe driving and exam questions.
The response is readable, organized, and easy to follow.

gradingInstructions: Use only this assignment and its rubric.
Reward reasoning that connects signs to driver action.
